title: mitrasacme alsinoides
intro: Mitrasacme alsinoides, also known as the False Pimpernel, is a flowering plant native to tropical Asia. It has been traditionally used in medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Mitrasacme alsinoides include its potential to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues due to its expectorant properties, as well as its ability to reduce pain and inflammation. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, or decoctions, and is also used in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine to treat various ailments.
